alert.name: Policy V2 7770001: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
alert.description: This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.
alert.subject: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs triggered at 04/28/2026 10:45 AM UTC

It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.
